The most disliked & despised characters in anime history · Tap to expand

1
Sakura Haruno
Naruto
Annoying Kunoichi
Useless Ally
"I'll protect you!" — said Sakura Haruno, before needing to be saved again. A medical-nin who spent most of Naruto's story crushing on Sasuke, crying, and contributing little while two boys carried the entire shinobi world on their backs.
Series
Naruto
Age
12–17
Role
Team 7 Kunoichi
Status
Alive
Abilities
Medical NinjutsuSuperhuman StrengthChakra ControlHundred Healings
Why Fans Hate Her
1
Spent the entire original series obsessing over Sasuke while Naruto risked his life to save him for her
2
Repeatedly abused Naruto emotionally and physically despite him always being there for her
3
Consistently needed saving in critical moments despite being a "strong kunoichi"
4
Her fake love confession to Naruto is considered one of the cruelest moments in the series
2
Malty Melromarc (Bitch)
The Rising of the Shield Hero
Bitch Princess
Villain
Crown Princess who falsely accused Naofumi of assault on day one, destroying his reputation, stripping him of companions and resources, and smiling while watching him suffer. Her cruelty is calculated, gleeful, and utterly remorseless.
Series
Shield Hero
Role
Crown Princess
Crime
False Accusation
Status
Alive
Abilities
ManipulationPolitical PowerSwordsmanshipLying
Why Fans Hate Her
1
Falsely accused the protagonist of rape within hours of meeting him, ruining his entire journey
2
Never faced true consequences until very late — spent the story smiling and scheming
3
Betrayed every single person who trusted her including fellow Heroes
4
Even her own father eventually renamed her "Bitch" — that says everything
3
Rachel
Tower of God
Ultimate Betrayer
Traitor
Bam climbed an infinite tower entirely for Rachel — his only reason for existing. She repaid him by pushing him off a platform to his supposed death and stealing his place. No character in anime history has destroyed a fan more thoroughly with a single action.
Series
Tower of God
Role
Bam's Reason
Crime
Betrayal & Murder
Status
Alive
Abilities
Light ManipulationObserverManipulation
Why Fans Hate Her
1
Pushed Bam off the platform after he sacrificed everything for her — episode 10 broke the fandom
2
Constantly uses others as stepping stones with zero remorse or gratitude
3
Her motivations are petty — she simply wants to see the stars herself and doesn't care who suffers
4
Widely considered the most hated character in manhwa/anime history by her own fandom
4
Mami Nanami
Rent-a-Girlfriend
Manipulative Ex
Antagonist
Dumped Kazuya heartlessly, then couldn't stand watching him move on. Spent the entire series sabotaging his relationships and ruining moments with calculated cruelty — all because she didn't want him, she just didn't want anyone else to have him.
Series
Rent-a-Girlfriend
Role
Ex-Girlfriend
Trait
Possessive
Status
Alive
Why Fans Hate Her
1
Broke up with Kazuya callously then actively destroyed every new relationship he built
2
Exposed Chizuru's rental girlfriend work publicly to humiliate her — pure sabotage
3
Oscillates between "I hate you" and "come back to me" with no consistency or decency
5
Shou Tucker
Fullmetal Alchemist
Chimera Alchemist
Deceased
State Alchemist who used human transmutation to merge his own daughter Nina and their dog Alexander into a chimera — purely to maintain his license. "Ed… ward…" is one of anime's most haunting lines. Tucker represents the worst of humanity behind a mild-mannered face.
Series
FMA Brotherhood
Age
~35
Crime
Human Transmutation
Status
Deceased
Abilities
Chimera AlchemyState AlchemistBiological Fusion
Why Fans Hate Him
1
Merged his innocent daughter Nina with their family dog to pass a government exam
2
Had already done the same to his wife years earlier — this was not a mistake, it was habit
3
Justified it with "a father must do anything for his work" — no remorse whatsoever
4
Nina's final words destroyed an entire generation of FMA viewers
6
Sugou Nobuyuki
Sword Art Online
Villain Admin
Villain
A corporate executive who exploited 300 comatose SAO players as unwitting test subjects for illegal mind control experiments. Held Asuna captive in ALO as his prisoner and "wife," and used admin privileges to torture Kirito in front of her. Pure sadism wrapped in a business suit.
Series
SAO (Fairy Dance)
Role
RECT CEO / Admin
Crime
Illegal Experiments
Status
Imprisoned
Abilities (In-Game)
Admin PrivilegesPain AmplificationWorld Control
Why Fans Hate Him
1
Used 300 comatose players as non-consenting brain experiment subjects
2
Imprisoned Asuna in a cage as his "wife" while she was unconscious in the real world
3
Tortured Kirito using admin pain settings just for his own entertainment
4
Widely considered one of the most disgusting anime villains ever written
7
Danzo Shimura
Naruto
War Hawk
Deceased
The man who ordered the Uchiha clan massacre, stole Shisui's Sharingan, manipulated Konoha's leadership for decades, and convinced himself every act of evil was "for the village." Danzo is what happens when fear and ambition replace wisdom and compassion.
Series
Naruto Shippuden
Role
Root ANBU Leader
Crime
Genocide Order
Status
Deceased
Abilities
IzanagiSharingan (stolen)Wind StyleKinjutsu
Why Fans Hate Him
1
Ordered the massacre of the entire Uchiha clan, creating Sasuke's trauma and Itachi's tragedy
2
Stole Shisui's Sharingan by force, driving him to suicide
3
Ran Root — a black ops unit that emotionally destroyed child soldiers
4
His final Kage Summit appearance was an embarrassment — cowardice disguised as conviction
8
Nina Einstein
Code Geass
Obsessive Fanatic
Antagonist
A brilliant scientist who invented a nuclear weapon of mass destruction out of obsessive grief over Euphemia's death. She nearly destroyed Tokyo. Her unstable fanaticism made her one of the most dangerous and loathed characters in the series.
Series
Code Geass R2
Role
Scientist
Crime
Near-Genocide Weapon
Status
Alive
Abilities
Nuclear GeniusFLEIJA BombScientific Research
Why Fans Hate Her
1
Built a nuclear warhead called FLEIJA out of pure emotional obsession
2
Nearly wiped out Tokyo — millions of civilians nearly died for her grief
3
Her racism toward Elevens was blatant and never adequately addressed
9
Seryu Ubiquitous
Akame ga Kill
Justice Obsessed
Deceased
A soldier so fanatically devoted to a corrupt empire's idea of "justice" that she cheerfully tortured and murdered anyone labeled an enemy, smiling the entire time. She killed Sheele — one of the most beloved Night Raid members — in cold blood while laughing.

Akame ga Kill
Role
Imperial Guard
Teigu
Coro (Beast)

Abilities

Killed Sheele — one of the most beloved characters — while smiling with joy

Serves a genocidal empire and calls it justice without a single moment of self-reflection
3
Her cheerful sadism while torturing enemies is uniquely disturbing
10
Gabi Braun
Attack on Titan
Warrior Candidate
Alive
Eldian child warrior who killed Sasha — the beloved "potato girl" — with a rifle shot from a blimp. Gabi's indoctrinated hatred of Paradisians and her reckless actions made her widely despised, though the series intentionally uses her as a mirror to Eren.

Attack on Titan
Age
12

Warrior Candidate

Alive

3
Her arc requires patience — fans had to watch her learn what viewers already knew
11
Kyubey
Puella Magi Madoka Magica
Incubator
Incubator
A creature that appears as an adorable cat-rabbit, recruiting young girls into magical contracts while deliberately withholding that they will inevitably become the very witches they fight. Kyubey feels no emotion — it views human suffering as a thermodynamic resource.
Series
Madoka Magica
Role
Incubator / Recruiter
Crime
Emotional Exploitation
Status
Immortal
Abilities
TelepathyContract MakingWish GrantingImmortal
Why Fans Hate It
1
Recruits children into a system designed to destroy them without disclosing the full truth
2
Genuinely incapable of understanding human emotion — which makes it more terrifying
3
Smiles innocently while describing the horrific fate awaiting every magical girl
12
Mahito
Jujutsu Kaisen
Soul Manipulator
Deceased
A curse born from human hatred who can reshape souls with a touch — twisting bodies into grotesque forms. Killed Junpei in front of Yuji in one of JJK's most traumatic scenes. Mahito is joy embodied in evil — he genuinely loves causing suffering.
Series
Jujutsu Kaisen
Type
Special Grade Curse
Crime
Junpei's Death
Status
Deceased
Abilities
Idle TransfigurationSoul ReshapeBlack FlashPolymorphic Soul Isomer
Why Fans Hate Him
1
Killed Junpei by transfiguring him while Yuji watched, helpless — one of anime's cruelest deaths
2
Laughs through every atrocity — suffering is entertainment to him
3
Represents the purest distillation of human self-hatred given a body
13
Akito Sohma
Fruits Basket
Vengeful God
Antagonist
Head of the Sohma family and "God" of the Zodiac, Akito emotionally and physically abused every cursed Sohma member for years out of a pathological fear of abandonment. Blinded Hatori, scarred Tohru, and terrorized an entire family. The tragedy is she was failed by every adult around her.
Series
Fruits Basket
Role
Sohma God
Crime
Abuse & Isolation
Status
Alive (Redeemed)
Why Fans Hate Them
1
Systematically abused every Zodiac member to maintain control and prevent them leaving
2
Destroyed Hatori's relationship and blinded him during a fit of rage
3
Stabbed Tohru and threw her down a cliff — the most shocking act in the series
14
Princess Renner
Overlord
The Golden Princess
Hidden Villain
Presented as the kingdom's saintly reformist princess — compassionate, brilliant, beloved. It was all a mask. Renner secretly orchestrated the massacre of thousands, betrayed her own kingdom to the undead empire, and did it all with a smile. Her true nature is one of anime's greatest reveals.
Series
Overlord
Role
Third Princess
True Nature
Psychopath
Status
Alive
Why Fans Hate Her
1
Betrayed the entire Re-Estize Kingdom — people she pretended to protect for years
2
Her "saintly" persona was calculated manipulation from the very beginning
3
Has zero empathy — she views everyone, including allies, as tools for her amusement
15
Envy
Fullmetal Alchemist
Shape-Shifting Homunculus
Deceased
A homunculus who disguised itself as a soldier and fired the shot that started the Ishvalan War — killing a child to ignite a genocide. Envy delights in pain, transformation, and manipulation. Its final moments, however, earned a complicated reaction from fans.
Series
FMA Brotherhood
Sin
Envy
Crime
Started a Genocide
Status
Deceased
Abilities
ShapeshiftingImmortal RegenerationGiant FormPhilosopher's Stone
Why Fans Hate It
1
Disguised as a soldier and murdered an Ishvalan child to trigger a nationwide massacre
2
Revels in causing pain — transformation and cruelty are pure joy for Envy
3
Its true form — a writhing mass of stolen souls — is one of anime's most haunting images
16
Flare Arlgrande Jioral
Redo of Healer
Cruel Princess Knight
Villain
First Princess of Jioral Kingdom who enslaved, tortured, and degraded Keyaru for years while using his healing powers for the kingdom. Her treatment of him drives the entire dark revenge narrative. Flare is designed to be hated — and she succeeds entirely.

Role
First Princess
Crime
Slavery & Torture

Enslaved and systematically abused Keyaru for years with no guilt whatsoever

Used his healing powers for the kingdom's gain while treating him as less than human

Embodies the corrupt nobility archetype at its absolute worst and most personal
17
Boruto Uzumaki
Boruto: Naruto Next Generations
Ninja Prodigy's Son
Alive
Son of the Seventh Hokage who starts the series resenting his father for being too dedicated to protecting the village — the very thing Naruto spent his entire life fighting for. Fans who grew up with Naruto found Boruto's complaints tone-deaf and his early arc insufferable.
Series
Boruto
Age
12–16
Role
Protagonist
Status
Alive
Abilities
JouganKarma SealRasenganScientific Ninja Tools
Why Fans Hate Him
1
Complained about his Hokage father while fans watched Naruto suffer alone his entire childhood
2
Cheated in the Chunin exams using a scientific tool — brought shame to Naruto in front of the world
3
Early series writing made him feel like an ingrate rather than a relatable protagonist
18
Minoru Mineta
My Hero Academia
Perverted Hero
Alive
Class 1-A's resident pervert who consistently sexually harasses female classmates with zero consequences. In a series about becoming genuine heroes and growing beyond your flaws, Mineta's entire arc revolves around peeping on girls. Fans find him painfully unfunny and tonally wrong.
Series
My Hero Academia
Quirk
Pop Off
Role
Class 1-A Student
Status
Alive
Why Fans Hate Him
1
Repeatedly sexually harasses Tsuyu, Momo, and other classmates with no growth or consequences
2
Designed as comic relief in a series that doesn't need this type of humour
3
Every other Class 1-A member evolves — Mineta stays exactly the same across all seasons
19
Near
Death Note
L's Successor
Alive
The prodigy who succeeded L and ultimately cornered Light Yagami. Despite being technically brilliant, fans felt Near was a pale imitation of L — colder, less charismatic, and robbed of the iconic rivalry energy that made Death Note's first half legendary.
Series
Death Note
Real Name
Nate River
Role
L's Successor / SPK
Status
Alive
Why Fans Dislike Him
1
Replaced L — the most beloved character in the series — and couldn't match his presence
2
Felt like a corporate copy of L without the humanity, warmth, or unpredictability
3
His victory over Light felt unearned to many fans who wanted a more dramatic conclusion
20
Ragyo Kiryuin
Kill la Kill
Twisted Mother
Deceased
CEO of Revocs Corporation and Satsuki's mother — a woman who sold humanity to alien Life Fibers for absolute power, abused her daughters in the most disturbing ways imaginable, and viewed all humans as cattle for harvesting. Ragyo is maximalist evil with rainbow hair.
Series
Kill la Kill
Role
Revocs CEO
Crime
Betrayal of Humanity
Status
Deceased
Abilities
Life Fiber FusionAbsolute SubmissionRegenerationShinra-Koketsu

Sold the entire human race to alien parasites for personal power
3
Threw her infant daughter in the trash — and considered it rational decision-making
